Related live items: pm-lt6n for GH-427 Windows nightly, pm-7zs0 for release-health verification, pm-5566 for the docstring gate that currently blocks Auto Release, and pm-98cz for lifecycle primitive correctness.
Bundle GH-433 self-parent guard, Windows nightly lock proof, and pnpm 11 bootstrap hardening

Implementation bundle for current live failures: reject parent self-cycles at mutation time, harden the Windows Node 24 lock coverage assertion behind GH-427, and migrate pnpm 11 build-script/override settings so local bootstrap and release gates run reliably.

pm update --parent <same-id> rejects before writing; create/update parent self-cycle regression coverage passes; Windows lock coverage no longer depends on POSIX-only write-failure behavior; pnpm 11 bootstrap succeeds with reviewed allowBuilds/overrides in pnpm-workspace.yaml; focused tests, full coverage, static quality, temp-dir smoke, changelog check, and release-health evidence recorded.
